reviews.review_description:
My son was diagnosed with selective mutism when he was 4 and he’s currently 18. We’ve tried many forms of treatment over the years
With limited success. We were introduced to vocal reality about 3 months ago.
We had a free initial consultation with the creator then 4 weekly coaching sessions for guidance and support. Because of her own personal and family situation, she is extremely
relatable and  empathetic and this really made my son feel comfortable and understood.
Since using this program, he has been able to order more in restaurants and answer people in public. We are so happy with how fast he has made progress using the vocal reality program and would recommend it as an affordable treatment option.

This type of app will be a corner stone of VR and help millions. Like the kids schooled in covid who didnt see a face.
Expand to public speaking and group approch (intro's).

developer_response.body:
Hello!

Thank you for using Vocal Reality and sharing your feedback. We’d love to better understand your experience so we can continue improving the app.

Please send any issues, bug reports, or suggestions to: support@invisibleseams.studio. We'll use your feedback to improve the experience for everyone.

Thank you!
